name: JBSA Fort Sam Houston
tagline: The home of military medicine - Brooke Army Medical Center and the military's medical training hub.
_note: JBSA base (San Antonio). Verified from official sources (jbsa.mil, home.army.mil/samhouston, bamc.tricare.mil, METC/MEDCoE, fshisd.net, DeCA/AAFES, DoD BAH tool). MHA TX285 (same as the other JBSA bases). Medium/low-confidence flags: base coords (approx), off-base ZIP 78209, surrounding off-post school districts (do not publish specific assignment).

data.Also hosts: METC + Army Medical Center of Excellence (MEDCoE)

sections.title: Mission & Identity
data: JBSA-Fort Sam Houston is the center of U.S. military medicine. Its signature tenant is Brooke Army Medical Center (BAMC), the Army's flagship medical institution and the Defense Department's only Level I Trauma Center.

The post also hosts the Medical Education & Training Campus (METC) - which trains enlisted medics for the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Coast Guard - and the U.S. Army Medical Center of Excellence (MEDCoE). Installation support is provided by the Air Force's 502d Air Base Wing.

data.subtitle: Fort Sam Houston is the center of military medicine - which makes it one of the best-resourced bases in the country for a family's healthcare.
intro: Brooke Army Medical Center anchors the entire San Antonio military health system - it's the DoD's flagship medical center and its only Level I Trauma Center. For families, that means deep healthcare access on and around the post.

For many service members, an assignment here is tied to medical training or care, given METC and MEDCoE. It's a different feel from an operational post - more campus and care than flight line or motor pool.

recommendations.advice: BAMC serves the whole San Antonio military community; confirm enrollment and referrals through TRICARE West.
Established neighborhoods like Alamo Heights / Terrell Hills sit just off post, with a short commute to central San Antonio.
You're minutes from downtown - the River Walk, the Pearl, and the rest of San Antonio.

sections.title: Gates & Access
data: Visitors without a DoD ID need a visitor pass and a REAL ID-compliant ID.
Gate hours and visitor requirements change - confirm the current details on the official JBSA-Fort Sam Houston visitor information page before you go.

sections.title: On-Base Housing
data: On-post family housing is privatized, managed by Hunt Military Communities (which took over management in 2021).
Eligibility and availability vary by rank and family size - check the garrison housing office and the partner for current options and waitlists.

source.label: DoD BAH Rate Lookup (MHA TX285, CY2026)

sections.title: Schools
data: On post, schooling is the Fort Sam Houston Independent School District (FSHISD) - a Texas public district physically on the installation (Fort Sam Houston Elementary; Robert G. Cole Middle/High). It is not a DoDEA district.
Off post, school assignment depends on your San Antonio address - confirm the specific district and campus for any neighborhood you're considering.

data.Distinction: DoD's only Level I Trauma Center
